strategies.finding: 5 CI rounds in 51.4min session led to success; 4 CI rounds without Copilot agent = stalled branch

strategies.name: Temporal Analysis
strategies.description: Apply time-series analysis to session duration data to identify efficiency trends and correlate with completion rates. Track avg/median duration per day and flag anomalies.
strategies.finding: Duration is the strongest predictor of session health. Apr 30 avg 150min = lowest completion rate (72.4%). Duration improving 12 min/day over the 5-day window.
